title: Leh Ladakh Ultimate Bike Expedition 2026
description: Experience the thrill of riding through the world's highest motorable roads in Ladakh. This 8-day adventure covers Khardung La Pass, Nubra Valley, Pangong Lake, and Chang La Pass. The package includes accommodation, breakfast and dinner, backup vehicle support, mechanic assistance, permits, and tour captain guidance. Exclusions include personal expenses, fuel, travel insurance, and airfare. Suitable for experienced riders seeking a high-altitude adventure.
